  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel used by fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model
    Class
    Description
    JSONManager
    Handles AnalysisSettings export and import as JSON.
    MorphologyManager
    Provides binary morphological operations (Erode, Dilate, Open, Close, Watershed).
    PreprocessingManager
    Provides preprocessing management operations.
    ThresholdingManager
    Provides segmentation and thresholding operations on ImagePlus objects.
